flow_points: Pakistan started strong, scoring 56/2 in the Powerplay at 9.33 RPO.
Sahibzada Farhan anchored Pakistan's innings, contributing 38.4% of the team's runs.
USA's bowlers struggled with economy, notably SN Netravalkar (10.5 RPO) and Harmeet Singh (10.25 RPO).
Milind Kumar had a very expensive outing for USA, conceding 16.0 RPO.
United States of America had a good start to their chase, scoring 50/1 in the Powerplay at 8.33 RPO.
SC van Schalkwyk delivered a crucial spell for Pakistan, taking 4 wickets for 25 runs.
Usman Tariq sustained defensive pressure, finishing with 3 wickets for 27 runs.
USA struggled under extreme chase pressure (Index: 94.0), leading to a late-innings collapse.
